FAQ.LABEL: FAQ
FAQ.TITLE: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Find quick answers to your most common questions.

GENERAL.A1: Cyna is a B2B platform specializing in cybersecurity solutions. We offer SaaS services (SOC, EDR, XDR), software licenses and physical products to protect your business.
GENERAL.Q2: Who are your solutions designed for?
GENERAL.A2: Our solutions are designed for businesses of all sizes, from SMEs to large enterprises, looking to strengthen their IT security with professional tools and expert support.
GENERAL.A3: You can reach us through our contact page, by email at contact@cyna.it or directly from your client dashboard. Our team responds within 24 business hours.

PRODUCTS.Q1: What types of products do you offer?
PRODUCTS.A1: We offer security hardware (firewalls, security keys, network equipment) as well as complementary accessories to strengthen the physical protection of your infrastructure.
PRODUCTS.Q2: Are the products covered by warranty?
PRODUCTS.A2: Yes, all our products come with a manufacturer warranty. Warranty details are listed on each product page. Our support team is available if you encounter any issues.
PRODUCTS.A3: Orders are shipped within 2 to 5 business days. Shipping is free for business orders. Delivery tracking is available from your client dashboard.

SERVICES.Q1: What SaaS services do you offer?
SERVICES.A1: We offer SOC (Security Operations Center), EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) and XDR (Extended Detection & Response) solutions as monthly or annual subscriptions.
SERVICES.Q2: Can I try a service before committing?
SERVICES.A2: Contact our sales team to discuss your needs. We can set up a personalized demonstration of our solutions tailored to your infrastructure.
SERVICES.A3: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually. You can manage, modify or cancel your subscriptions at any time from your client dashboard.

SECURITY.A1: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use recognized security standards and our infrastructure is hosted in certified data centers in Europe.
SECURITY.A2: Yes, Cyna is fully GDPR compliant. We only collect data necessary for our services to function and you retain full control over your personal information.
SECURITY.A3: All payments are processed by Stripe, the global leader in online payments. Your banking information is never stored on our servers.

MENTIONS.IP_CONTENT: All content on this website (text, images, logos, icons, software, databases) is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, transmission, or distortion, in whole or in part, of the website or its content, by any means and on any medium, is prohibited without the prior written consent of Cyna SAS. Any unauthorized use of the website or its content will be considered as counterfeiting and prosecuted in accordance with articles L.335-2 and following of the French Intellectual Property Code.
MENTIONS.LIABILITY_CONTENT: Cyna SAS strives to ensure the accuracy and currency of the information published on this website and reserves the right to correct its content at any time without notice. Cyna SAS disclaims any liability in case of difficulty accessing its website or connection interruptions, regardless of the cause. Furthermore, Cyna SAS cannot be held responsible for the use of the information on the website by users, nor for any direct or indirect damages that may result.
MENTIONS.LAW_CONTENT: These legal notices are governed by French law. In case of dispute and in the absence of an amicable resolution, the French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

CGU.TITLE: Terms of Service
CGU.OBJECT_CONTENT: These Terms of Service (ToS) define the terms and conditions of use of the Cyna platform (hereinafter "the Platform"), as well as the rights and obligations of users. The Platform is a B2B online commerce service specialized in the sale of cybersecurity SaaS solutions (SOC, EDR, XDR) and related products.
CGU.ACCEPTANCE_CONTENT: The use of the Platform implies full and complete acceptance of these ToS. By accessing the Platform or creating a user account, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and accepted all of these conditions. If you do not accept these conditions, you are advised not to use the Platform.
CGU.SERVICES_CONTENT: The Platform offers its professional users a catalog of cybersecurity solutions including: SaaS services (SOC, EDR, XDR) in the form of monthly or annual subscriptions, software licenses (Office 365, Adobe, VMware, etc.) and physical products (hardware and accessories). Cyna SAS reserves the right to modify, suspend or remove all or part of the services offered, at any time and without notice.
CGU.ACCOUNT_CONTENT: Access to certain features of the Platform requires creating a user account. The user agrees to provide accurate, complete and up-to-date information during registration. The user is responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and all activity carried out under their account. In case of unauthorized use of their account, the user must immediately inform Cyna SAS.
CGU.PRICING_CONTENT: Product and service prices are indicated in euros excluding tax (HT) on the Platform. Cyna SAS reserves the right to modify its prices at any time, with products and services being billed based on the prices in effect at the time of order validation. Payment is made online by credit card via the secure Stripe payment solution. SaaS subscription billing is recurring according to the chosen frequency (monthly or annual).
CGU.WITHDRAWAL_CONTENT: In accordance with article L.221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to contracts for the supply of digital content not provided on a tangible medium whose execution has begun with the prior consent of the consumer. For SaaS services and software licenses, the right of withdrawal cannot be exercised once access to the service has been activated. For physical products, the user has a 14-day period from receipt to exercise their right of withdrawal.
CGU.LIABILITY_CONTENT: Cyna SAS uses all reasonable means to ensure the availability and proper functioning of the Platform. However, Cyna SAS cannot guarantee permanent and uninterrupted availability of its services. Cyna SAS shall not be held liable for damages resulting from the use or inability to use the Platform, including in case of data loss or third-party intrusion.
CGU.DATA_CONTENT: The processing of users' personal data is carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act. For more information on the collection and processing of your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
CGU.CHANGES_CONTENT: Cyna SAS reserves the right to modify these ToS at any time. Users will be informed of any substantial modification by email or notification on the Platform. Continued use of the Platform after notification of changes constitutes acceptance of the new ToS.
CGU.DISPUTES_CONTENT: These ToS are governed by French law. In case of dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of these ToS, the parties shall endeavor to find an amicable solution. Failing that, the dispute shall be brought before the competent courts of Paris, France.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.DATA_COLLECTED_CONTENT: When using the Cyna Platform, we collect the following categories of personal data: identification data (name, surname, email address, phone number), professional data (company name, VAT number), connection data (IP address, connection logs, browser type), transaction data (order history, payment methods via Stripe) and browsing data (pages visited, session duration, preferences).
PRIVACY.PURPOSE_CONTENT: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes: management of your user account and authentication, processing and tracking of your orders and subscriptions, billing and payment management via Stripe, sending communications related to your account (confirmations, invoices, alerts), improvement of our services and user experience, compliance with our legal and regulatory obligations, and Platform security.
PRIVACY.LEGAL_BASIS_CONTENT: The processing of your data is based on the following legal bases under the GDPR: contract performance for managing your account and orders (Article 6.1.b), consent for sending commercial communications (Article 6.1.a), legitimate interest for improving our services and Platform security (Article 6.1.f), and legal obligation for retaining invoices and accounting documents (Article 6.1.c).
PRIVACY.RETENTION_CONTENT: Your personal data is retained for the following periods: active account data: throughout the business relationship then 3 years after the last activity, transaction data: 10 years in accordance with accounting obligations, connection data: 1 year in accordance with current legislation, cookies: 13 months maximum. Upon expiry of these periods, your data is deleted or anonymized.
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_CONTENT: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights over your personal data: right of access (obtain a copy of your data), right of rectification (correct inaccurate or incomplete data), right of erasure (request deletion of your data), right to data portability (receive your data in a structured and readable format), right to object (oppose the processing of your data), right to restriction of processing. To exercise these rights, you can contact us at dpo@cyna.it or through your account settings. You also have the right to file a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).
PRIVACY.COOKIES_CONTENT: The Platform uses cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the service: authentication cookies (user session), security cookies (CSRF protection) and preference cookies (language, theme). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used. Essential cookies do not require consent as they are indispensable for the Platform to function.
PRIVACY.INTERNATIONAL_TRANSFERS_CONTENT: The Platform is hosted by Railway Corporation in the United States. Personal data transfers to the United States are governed by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, in accordance with Article 46.2.c of the GDPR, to ensure an adequate level of protection for your personal data.
PRIVACY.WITHDRAW_CONSENT_CONTENT: When the processing of your data is based on your consent (Article 6.1.a of the GDPR), you have the right to withdraw your consent at any time. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent carried out before its withdrawal. You can withdraw your consent by contacting us at dpo@cyna.it or through your account settings.
PRIVACY.AUTOMATED_DECISIONS_CONTENT: Cyna SAS does not carry out any automated decision-making, including profiling, within the meaning of Article 22 of the GDPR, that would produce legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affect you.
PRIVACY.DPO_CONTENT: For any question regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO):
